praty-abhi-√jñā P. Ā. -jānāti, -jānīte, to recognize, remember, know, understand,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to come to one's self, recover consciousness,  Kathās.  :
Caus. -jñāpayati, to recall to mind,  Śaṃk.
